title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: Casey West demonstrates a multi-agent system architecture (Race Condition) that uses callback mechanisms to bypass LLM calls for deterministic tasks like route planning. The approach scales to 1,000 agents running primarily on deterministic code, with tokens reserved for decisions that require the LLM.
